operational_knowledge_units.title: LocationActiveDwellModel shows current active dwells for dwell-tracked locations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the LocationActiveDwellModel table displays active dwells at locations that are marked for DwellTracking.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'The LocationActiveDwellModel table displays the active dwells at locations marked for DwellTracking'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database Location Active Dwell Model. The LocationActiveDwellModel table displays active dwells at locations marked for DwellTracking.

operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV departure ends active dwell and archives activity to LocationDwellActivity
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that when the AGV leaves a location, dwelling is complete and the dwell activity is archived to the LocationDwellActivity table.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'One the AGV leaves it is done dwelling and the activity is archived to the LocationDwellActivity.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: When the AGV leaves, dwelling is finished and the activity is archived to LocationDwellActivity. Active dwell information is associated with LocationActiveDwellModel.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No procedure extracted from Location Active Dwell Model slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes database table behavior for active dwell records and archival when an AGV leaves; no explicit action sequence or operator steps are shown.
warnings: Slide provides database behavior and lifecycle information, not reusable action guidance.
Do not infer steps for querying, validating, or editing database records because they are not stated on the slide.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate: slide explains that LocationActiveDwellModel shows active dwells for dwell-tracked locations and that AGV departure archives the activity to LocationDwellActivity, but it does not provide explicit operational steps.
